name: Chile Relleno Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Open the green chilies and remove the seeds, then drain them.
3. Slice the Monterey Jack cheese into 1/4-inch thick pieces and stuff inside the chilies.
4. Place the stuffed chilies in an ungreased 3-quart baking dish.
5. Mix together the eggs, milk, flour, salt, pepper, and cilantro.
6. Pour the mixture over the stuffed chilies.
7. Sprinkle the Cheddar cheese on top.
8. Bake uncovered for 45 minutes. Serve with Cornsticks.
